tasks.title: Domain: validateUrl guard (trim, non-empty, scheme allowlist, host, length)
tasks.dod: validateUrl(raw) returns the trimmed url or throws ValidationError whose `reason` is one of 'url required' | 'url too long' | 'malformed url' | 'unsafe scheme'; pure, unit-testable without HTTP; first red→green target = empty url (AC-02)

tasks.title: Domain: dedup — reuse existing code for an already-stored normalized url
tasks.dod: createLink validates first, then looks up the normalized url; on a hit it returns { code, created: false } and inserts nothing; on a miss it inserts and returns { code, created: true }

tasks.title: App: 400 on invalid, 200 on dedup hit, 201 on new
tasks.dod: POST /api/shorten maps ValidationError to 400 { error: reason }, a dedup hit to 200 { code, short_url }, a new create to 201; existing tests (tests/unit/shorten.test.js, tests/integration/shorten.test.js) stay green

tasks.title: Frontend: inline validation error under the form
tasks.dod: a 400 renders its `error` string in #error under the form instead of failing silently; the next successful submit clears it

tasks.title: Tests: unit + integration for AC-01..07
tasks.dod: npm run test:fast green; empty / scheme / malformed / too-long / trim / dedup all covered, plus the 2048-2049 boundary and a 'no row written on reject' assertion
